overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing an armored character traversing a shallow turquoise waterfront with ancient stone ruins and massive cliff formations. The character walks steadily through the water alongside another mounted rider, approaching misty waterfalls and rocky outcrops in a fantasy game environment.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through expansive shallow turquoise waters under a bright sky, with distant mountains visible ahead. A mounted NPC travels parallel on the right side as they move toward massive cliff formations in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a more enclosed space as massive rock cliffs dominate the view, with waterfalls cascading down their faces creating a misty atmosphere. The mounted NPC moves ahead toward the cliffs while the rock outcropping on the left draws closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone ruins along rocky coastline

white water waves breaking against rocky outcrops

segments.scene_description: Passing the waterfalls, the character enters an area with ancient stone ruins and platforms partially submerged in the water. The scene shifts to a rocky coastline where waves crash against the rocks on the left, while the character continues exploring the historic stone architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an expansive turquoise waterfront that gradually transitions into a misty canyon of waterfalls and ancient ruins. It begins with the character and a mounted companion traversing shallow, bright waters under an open sky toward distant mountains. As the camera advances, the environment becomes more enclosed by massive rock cliffs, where cascading waterfalls create a dense mist that envelops the travelers. The scene then shifts past the falls into a historic area featuring partially submerged stone platforms and ruins. Finally, the path opens toward a rocky coastline where waves crash against the shore as the character continues to explore the ancient architecture.
